question: The chart shows browser usage share by product (%). Which statement is correct according to the chart data?

options.A: Firefox accounts for less than 20% of the market.
options.B: Chrome has a larger market share than Others.
options.C: Edge holds over half of the market.
options.D: Safari has the largest market share among the products shown.

explanation: From the labels, Edge has the highest share (62%). The bars' heights are not proportional to the percentages (they use a separate 'height' value), which can mislead viewers into thinking Edge is largest when relying on visual comparison.
